---
marimo-static-output: true
---

# Model { #json2vec.Model }

```python
Model(hyperparameters, *, batch_size=1, optimizer=None, scheduler=None)
```

Neural model generated from a `json2vec` schema tree.

`Model` owns the schema hyperparameters, tensorfield embedders, array
encoders, decoders, and convenience methods for prediction, checkpointing,
schema display and mutation.

## Example {.doc-section .doc-section-example}

```python
import json2vec as j2v

model = j2v.Model.from_schema(
    j2v.Category("segment", max_vocab_size=32),
    j2v.Category("label", target=True, max_vocab_size=4),
    d_model=16,
    n_layers=1,
    n_heads=4,
    batch_size=8,
    embed=True,
)
```

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [from_schema](#json2vec.Model.from_schema) | Build a model directly from schema fields. |
| [select](#json2vec.Model.select) | Return schema nodes that satisfy every predicate. |
| [update](#json2vec.Model.update) | Mutate selected schema nodes and rebuild compatible modules. |
| [extend](#json2vec.Model.extend) | Append new schema fields under one selected array node and rebuild modules. |
| [delete](#json2vec.Model.delete) | Permanently remove selected schema nodes and rebuild modules. |
| [reset](#json2vec.Model.reset) | Reinitialize selected runtime node modules while preserving schema values. |
| [override](#json2vec.Model.override) | Temporarily mutate selected schema nodes and keep runtime modules synchronized. |
| [save](#json2vec.Model.save) | Save model weights and schema hyperparameters to a checkpoint. |
| [load](#json2vec.Model.load) | Load a `Model` checkpoint written by `Model.save(...)`. |
| [predict](#json2vec.Model.predict) | Return typed predictions and configured embeddings for a raw or encoded batch. |

### from_schema { #json2vec.Model.from_schema }

```python
from_schema(
    *field_args,
    d_model,
    n_layers,
    n_heads,
    batch_size=1,
    fields=None,
    name='record',
    description=None,
    embed=False,
    attention=AttentionMode.mha,
    n_linear=1,
    dropout=None,
    optimizer=None,
    scheduler=None,
)
```

Build a model directly from schema fields.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name        | Type                            | Description                                                                   | Default             |
|-------------|---------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------|
| *field_args | SchemaField                     | Field constructors such as `Category`, `Number`, or nested `Array` nodes.     | `()`                |
| d_model     | int                             | Shared model width.                                                           | _required_          |
| n_layers    | int                             | Number of encoder layers on generated array nodes.                            | _required_          |
| n_heads     | int                             | Attention heads used by generated nodes.                                      | _required_          |
| batch_size  | int                             | Batch size used by data modules, examples, and mocked Lightning input arrays. | `1`                 |
| fields      | Sequence\[SchemaField\] \| None | Optional sequence form of `field_args`.                                       | `None`              |
| name        | str                             | Root array name. Defaults to `record`.                                        | `'record'`          |
| description | str \| None                     | Optional description on the generated root array.                             | `None`              |
| embed       | bool                            | Configure the generated root array as an embedding output.                    | `False`             |
| attention   | AttentionMode \| str            | Attention mode for the generated root array.                                  | `AttentionMode.mha` |
| n_linear    | int                             | Feed-forward block count on the generated root array.                         | `1`                 |
| dropout     | Rate \| None                    | Optional dropout rate on the generated root array.                            | `None`              |
| optimizer   | OptimizerConfig \| None         | Optimizer instance or factory used by Lightning training.                     | `None`              |
| scheduler   | SchedulerConfig \| None         | Optional scheduler config or factory.                                         | `None`              |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type   | Description                                           |
|--------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------|
|        | Self   | A compiled `Model` with modules built for the schema. |

### select { #json2vec.Model.select }

```python
select(*predicates, include_root=True, use_cache=True)
```

Return schema nodes that satisfy every predicate.

### update { #json2vec.Model.update }

```python
update(
    *predicates,
    strict=True,
    allow_extra=False,
    include_root=True,
    validate=True,
    use_cache=False,
    **values,
)
```

Mutate selected schema nodes and rebuild compatible modules.

`target=True` is shorthand for `p_prune=1.0`; `target=False` clears
target behavior by setting `p_prune=0.0`.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name         | Type                                                         | Description                                                                                                                | Default   |
|--------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------|
| *predicates  | NodePredicate \| NodeAttribute \| Callable\[\[Node\], bool\] | Predicates used to select nodes.                                                                                           | `()`      |
| strict       | bool                                                         | Raise when a selected node cannot accept one of `values`.                                                                  | `True`    |
| allow_extra  | bool                                                         | Permit updates to extra metadata fields on models that allow unknown fields.                                               | `False`   |
| include_root | bool                                                         | Include the root node in predicate matching.                                                                               | `True`    |
| validate     | bool                                                         | Validate each node after applying candidate values.                                                                        | `True`    |
| use_cache    | bool                                                         | Permit cached selector results. Mutations default this to `False` so updates always evaluate against current schema state. | `False`   |
| **values     | Any                                                          | Schema attributes to update.                                                                                               | `{}`      |

### extend { #json2vec.Model.extend }

```python
extend(*args, include_root=True, use_cache=True)
```

Append new schema fields under one selected array node and rebuild modules.

### delete { #json2vec.Model.delete }

```python
delete(*predicates, include_root=False, use_cache=True)
```

Permanently remove selected schema nodes and rebuild modules.

### reset { #json2vec.Model.reset }

```python
reset(*predicates, include_root=True, use_cache=True, descendants=False)
```

Reinitialize selected runtime node modules while preserving schema values.

### override { #json2vec.Model.override }

```python
override(
    *predicates,
    strict=True,
    allow_extra=False,
    include_root=True,
    validate=True,
    use_cache=False,
    **values,
)
```

Temporarily mutate selected schema nodes and keep runtime modules synchronized.

### save { #json2vec.Model.save }

```python
save(pathname)
```

Save model weights and schema hyperparameters to a checkpoint.

### load { #json2vec.Model.load }

```python
load(checkpoint)
```

Load a `Model` checkpoint written by `Model.save(...)`.

### predict { #json2vec.Model.predict }

```python
predict(batch, preprocess=None, postprocess=None)
```

Return typed predictions and configured embeddings for a raw or encoded batch.
